# Kiron

> Kiron is an AI workout tracker app for iOS and Android that converts AI-generated fitness plans into structured training programs. Paste a workout plan from ChatGPT, Claude, or any AI chatbot — Kiron automatically maps every exercise, set, and rep into a full training schedule.

## What is Kiron?

Kiron solves a specific problem: AI chatbots like ChatGPT and Claude can write detailed workout programs, but there was no easy way to track them in a structured app. Kiron's AI parser reads the output and automatically creates a full program — exercises, sets, reps, weights, rest days, and multi-phase schedules — ready to follow day by day.

## Key Features

- **AI workout plan parser**: paste any AI-generated plan (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, etc.) and Kiron maps every exercise, set, and rep automatically
- **Automatic workout scheduling**: multi-phase programs, rest days, and deload weeks all handled on your calendar
- **Gym workout logger**: log sets, weights, and reps with an interface designed for the gym floor
- **Exercise library**: 1,000+ exercises with muscle targeting, instructions, cardio, carries, and timed holds
- **Progress tracking**: workout history, volume trends, and personal records in one place
- **Apple Health sync**: completed workouts automatically write to Apple Health (iOS) and Google Health Connect (Android)

## How it works

1. Ask ChatGPT, Claude, or any AI chatbot to write your workout program — tell it your goals, schedule, and available equipment
2. Copy the AI's response and paste it into Kiron
3. Kiron reads the plan and automatically creates your full program
4. Follow your schedule day by day, log sets and weights, and track progress over time

## Pricing

- **Weekly**: $4.99 per week — full app access, 3-day free trial, no credit card required
- **Annual**: $49.99 per year — full app access, best value (~80% savings vs weekly)

## Availability

- iOS: available on the Apple App Store
- Android: available on Google Play

## Company

Kiron is built by Berkeley Labs. Support: help@trykiron.com
